reasoning: The Google Year in Search "People" list ranks individuals by their 'trending' status, which Google defines as having the highest spike in search traffic in the current year compared to the previous year. In 2024, Joe Biden generated massive search volume due to the US presidential election and his historic withdrawal from the race. In 2025, he transitioned to being a retired ex-president. Because his baseline search volume in 2024 was immensely high, it is practically impossible for his 2025 search traffic to spike significantly above 2024 levels, let alone enough to make him the #2 globally trending person. Thus, his probability of resolving as YES is near zero.
